summary: Comprehensive testing of BookYourSalons platform completed successfully. All core APIs working (100% success rate), frontend fully functional with excellent mobile responsiveness. All required features from review request tested and operational.
passed_tests: Root API endpoint (/api/) returns correct message
Trending salons API (/api/salons/trending) returns valid array
Smart search API (/api/search) works with query parameters
Admin user analytics API (/api/admin/user-analytics) returns analytics data
Spam protection API (/api/booking/check-spam) validates customer requests
Salon status toggle API (/api/salon/{id}/toggle-status) accepts requests
Salon operating hours API (/api/salon/{id}/hours) accepts time updates
Review creation API (/api/review/create) accepts review submissions
Salon dashboard analytics API (/api/salon/{id}/dashboard-analytics) returns analytics
Nearby salons discovery API (/api/salons/nearby) works correctly
Customer visit history API (/api/customer/{phone}/visit-history) responds properly
Auto-close check API (/api/salon/{id}/check-auto-close) functions correctly
Photo gallery API (/api/salon/{id}/gallery) accepts photo uploads
Admin login API (/api/admin/login) handles authentication
Landing page loads correctly with proper branding and navigation
Customer login flow accessible with OTP-based authentication
Customer form includes name, gender selection, and phone validation
Google login integration available for customers
Salon partner registration flow accessible with phone verification
Admin login page accessible at /admin/login with OTP authentication
Header navigation buttons (Be a Salon Partner, Admin) working correctly
Customer and salon partner cards clickable and functional
Mobile responsiveness excellent - cards stack properly on mobile
Mobile form elements fully accessible and usable
All interactive elements properly clickable on both desktop and mobile
